name: apache2-bin
title: apache2-bin
summary: Apache HTTP Server (modules and other binary files)
description:
Apache HTTP Server (modules and other binary files)
The Apache HTTP Server Project's goal is to build a secure, efficient and
extensible HTTP server as standards-compliant open source software. The
result has long been the number one web server on the Internet.
.
This package contains the binaries only and does not set up a working
web-server instance. Install the "apache2" package to get a fully working
instance.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use apache2 because Apache HTTP Server (modules and other binary files).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use apache2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `apache2  [  -d serverroot ] [ -f config ] [ -C directive ] [ -c directive ] [ -D parameter ] [` as documented upstream for apache2.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `apache2  is the Apache HyperText Transfer Protocol (HTTP) server program. It is designed to be` as documented upstream for apache2.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair apache2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `apache2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
